competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Martin Baturina (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Petar Sucic (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 卡迈勒迪恩·苏莱马纳犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Elisha Owusu (Ghana).
Nikola Vlasic (Croatia) hits the left post with a right footed shot from outside the box. Assisted by Martin Baturina following a fast break.

events.description: 尼古拉·弗拉希奇射门偏出。 马丁·巴图林纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Kwasi Sibo (Ghana).
Attempt missed. Marin Pongracic (Croatia) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Luka Modric with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 马林·彭拉契奇射门偏出。 莫德里奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Thomas Partey (Ghana) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Elisha Owusu (Ghana).
Attempt saved. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Benjamin Asare (Ghana). Assisted by Luka Modric with a cross.

events.description: 伊万·佩里西奇射正。 莫德里奇参与进攻。
佩塔尔·苏西克 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Kwasi Sibo (Ghana).
Attempt blocked. Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Petar Sucic.

events.description: 马特奥·科瓦契奇射门被封堵。 佩塔尔·苏西克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Antoine Semenyo (Ghana) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Jonas Adjetey.

events.description: 安托万·塞梅诺射门偏出。 乔纳斯·阿杰蒂参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nikola Vlasic (Croatia).
Petar Sucic (Croatia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Croatia 1, Ghana 0.

events.description: 科乔·佩普拉·奥蓬 登场，乔纳斯·阿杰蒂 离场
阿卜杜勒·法塔乌 登场，以利沙·奥乌苏 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Croatia 1, Ghana 0.
Attempt missed. Abdul Fatawu (Ghana) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Derrick Luckassen.

events.description: 阿卜杜勒·法塔乌射门偏出。 德里克·卢卡森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Marvin Senaya (Ghana) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Offside, Ghana. Antoine Semenyo is caught offside.
Martin Baturina (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ante Budimir (Croatia).
Corner, Ghana. Conceded by Luka Modric.
Attempt blocked. Kamaldeen Sulemana (Ghana) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 卡迈勒迪恩·苏莱马纳射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jordan Ayew (Ghana).
Corner, Ghana. Conceded by Josip Stanisic.

events.description: 伊戈尔·马塔诺维奇 登场，安特·布迪米尔 离场
伊万·佩里西奇 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ivan Perisic (Croatia).
Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 布兰登·托马斯·阿桑特 登场，乔丹·阿尤 离场
欧内斯特·努阿马赫 登场，卡迈勒迪恩·苏莱马纳 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Marin Pongracic (Croatia).

events.description: 德里克·卢卡森 进球

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Goal Croatia 1-1 Ghana (Derrick Luckassen).

events.description: 马里奥·帕萨里克 登场，马特奥·科瓦契奇 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nikola Vlasic (Croatia).
Foul by Martin Baturina (Croatia).
Attempt saved. Mario Pasalic (Croatia) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Benjamin Asare (Ghana). Assisted by Martin Baturina.

events.description: 马里奥·帕萨里克射正。 马丁·巴图林纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Benjamin Asare.

events.description: 尼古拉·弗拉希奇 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Igor Matanovic (Croatia) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 卡莱布·伊伦基 登场，夸西·斯博 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Antoine Semenyo (Ghana).

events.description: 马可·帕萨利奇 登场，马丁·巴图林纳 离场
乔斯科·格瓦尔迪奥尔 登场，尼古拉·弗拉希奇 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Croatia. Igor Matanovic is caught offside.
Offside, Ghana. Antoine Semenyo is caught offside.
Petar Sucic (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Josko Gvardiol (Croatia) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Marin Pongracic (Croatia).
Attempt blocked. Mario Pasalic (Croatia) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Luka Modric.

events.description: 马里奥·帕萨里克射门被封堵。 莫德里奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Gideon Mensah.

events.description: 科乔·佩普拉·奥蓬 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Marvin Senaya (Ghana) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ernest Nuamah.

events.description: 马文·塞纳亚射门被封堵。 欧内斯特·努阿马赫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Igor Matanovic (Croatia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Marvin Senaya.
Attempt missed. Abdul Fatawu (Ghana) left footed shot from the left side of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Gideon Mensah.

events.description: 阿卜杜勒·法塔乌射门偏出。 吉迪恩·门萨参与进攻。

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

h2h.reason: 暂未找到两队的历史交锋记录

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

dongqiudiSource.emptyReason: 懂球帝全量球队赛历未列出此前直接交锋

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
